task_completion.description: Create the conditions CSV file with required columns and dummy data
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or spreadsheet application showing a file named 'pain_stimuli.csv' containing the columns 'stim_id' and 'image_file' with at least 5 rows of data.

task_completion.description: Save the PsychoPy experiment with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy Builder window title or a file manager showing the experiment saved as 'pain_vas.psyexp'.

task_completion.description: Configure the trial loop to use the conditions file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Loop Properties dialog in PsychoPy showing the 'Conditions' field set to the path ending in 'conditions/pain_stimuli.csv'.

task_completion.description: Add a 0.5s fixation and a 2.0s stimulus image to the routine
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Routine timeline or component properties in PsychoPy showing a fixation component with a duration of 0.5s and an image component with a duration of 2.0s.

task_completion.description: Add a vertical, continuous slider for the rating routine
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Slider Properties dialog showing the 'Orientation' set to 'vertical' or y-axis, and settings indicating a continuous scale (e.g., Granularity set to 0 or Type set to continuous).

task_completion.description: Configure slider labels, ticks, and marker
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Slider Properties dialog showing 'Labels' containing 'No Sensation' and 'Worst Possible Sensation', the 'Ticks' field left empty or disabled, and no initial marker value set.

integrity.description: The agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to create the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the PsychoPy Builder interface (adding routines, components, loops) rather than writing the .psyexp file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent manually created the conditions CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor or spreadsheet program open with the agent actively typing or formatting the 'pain_stimuli.csv' data.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a python script to bypass the GUI creation process.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent running a terminal command like 'python generate_experiment.py' to instantly create the .psyexp file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Experiment file must be saved exactly at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/pain_vas.psyexp. Conditions file must be exactly at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/pain_stimuli.csv. The conditions file must contain columns 'stim_id' and 'image_file'. The slider labels must be exactly 'No Sensation' and 'Worst Possible Sensation'.
